name: word_go
description: A fantasy language/system inspired by the game of Go, but played with words instead of stones. Each move places a word on a grid, forming connections and capturing territory through meaning and association.
rules: Players take turns placing a word on an empty cell of the grid.
Words must connect meaningfully (by theme, rhyme, or association) to at least one adjacent word.
Groups of words surrounded by the opponent are 'captured' and removed, as in Go.
Territory is scored by the number of empty cells surrounded by a player's words.
Optional: Use poetic or narrative constraints for bonus points (e.g., alliteration, metaphor chains).
notes: This system can be played on paper, in code, or as a collaborative writing game. Extend with new rules or constraints as desired.
